shims.shim_lifetime: one approved apply/proof cycle after all active consumers are rewritten
allowed_callers: existing runtime AppShell, compat, tools, RepoX, AuditX, TestX consumers only during migration
forbidden_new_references: new imports from validation in product or tooling code after apply
shims.validator_to_prevent_new_old_imports: future stale-import check for ^from validation|^import validation outside shim files
shims.blocker: Shim semantics need a gate because runtime currently imports validation.

shims.shim_lifetime: one approved apply/proof cycle after release/security/lib/tool consumers are rewritten
allowed_callers: existing release, security, lib, tools, validation, and TestX consumers only during migration
forbidden_new_references: new imports from meta.identity after apply
shims.validator_to_prevent_new_old_imports: future stale-import check for meta.identity outside shim files
shims.blocker: Identity semantics are release/security sensitive and require compatibility proof.

shims.shim_lifetime: one approved apply/proof cycle after all active consumers are rewritten
allowed_callers: existing validation, governance, AuditX, RepoX, release, security, review, and TestX consumers only during migration
forbidden_new_references: new imports from meta.stability after apply
shims.validator_to_prevent_new_old_imports: future stale-import check for meta.stability outside shim files
shims.blocker: Stability API is broad and affects RepoX/AuditX checks.

shims.shim_lifetime: one approved apply/proof cycle after release/setup/dist/tool consumers are rewritten
allowed_callers: existing release, setup, dist, governance tool, and TestX consumers only during migration
forbidden_new_references: new imports from governance after apply
shims.validator_to_prevent_new_old_imports: future stale-import check for ^from governance|^import governance outside shim files
shims.blocker: Release-control imports require proof before root governance can become a shim.

preserve_defer.reason: Preserve current until domain/runtime ownership plans exist.
Preserve current because product/client and game code import it.
